cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subtitle: Join millions of travelers who already trust our app

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Discover everything our mobile app has to offer

offlineMaps.title: Offline Maps
offlineMaps.desc: Access detailed maps even without internet connection. Perfect for traveling in remote areas.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.desc: Receive real-time alerts about your flight, bookings, and special offers.

offlineSync.title: Offline Sync
offlineSync.desc: Your data is automatically synchronized when connection is restored.

cameraIntegration.title: Camera Integration
cameraIntegration.desc: Capture and share your travel experiences directly from the app.

gpsNavigation.title: GPS Navigation
gpsNavigation.desc: Accurate turn-by-turn navigation to reach your destination hassle-free.

secureStorage.title: Secure Storage
secureStorage.desc: Your personal data and travel documents are protected with bank-level encryption.

maria.comment: This app completely changed how I travel. Everything is organized and super easy to use!

joao.comment: The offline maps are incredible! They've saved me multiple times when I had no signal.

ana.comment: The interface is intuitive and the notifications are very helpful. I recommend it to all travelers!

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.subtitle: See how easy it is to plan and manage your travels

explore.title: Explore Destinations
explore.desc: Discover new places with personalized recommendations based on your preferences.

plan.title: Plan Trips
plan.desc: Create detailed itineraries with all the information you need in one place.

book.title: Book Easily
book.desc: Make flight, hotel, and activity bookings with just a few taps.
